items.title: France vs. Iraq becomes first 2026 World Cup game delayed due to weather with heavy rain, lightning in area
items.summary: The first half of the match ended with heavy rain falling in Philadelphia, and the decision to delay the game was announced at halftime with lightning entering the area
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
